title: Executive Order 5477—To Permit Approval of an Application for Right of Way for a Telephone and Telegraph Line Within Power-Site Reserve No. 377
text:
Utah
Upon recommendation of the Secretary of the Interior, Executive order of July 1, 1913, creating Power-Site Reserve No. 377, in Utah, is hereby modified to the extent of authorizing him to approve an application filed by the Uinta Pipe Line Co., pursuant to the provisions of the act of March 4, 1911 (36 Stat. 1253), for right of way for a telephone and telegraph line crossing certain lands within said reserve.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
November 4, 1930.
